_doc: Curated source of truth for resource (mineral / mob loot / structure / world-gen) acquisition. See resources.md for narrative + categories. Sister doc to energy.json. Update by hand when discovery finds new data or a config value changes.

categories.multiplier: Machines that turn 1 mined ore into N ingots/dust. Finite per ore mined.
categories.automated_mining: Machines that auto-mine an area. Finite per chunk.
categories.renewable_ore: Infinite ore generation with no mining. Power in, ore out.
categories.renewable_mob_loot: Infinite mob loot via spawner farms. Energy + spawner setup.
categories.synthetic_mob_loot: Loot fabricated from data; no spawning required.
categories.transmutation: Convert one resource to another (e.g. Mekanism Solar Neutron Activator).

renewable_watchlist.summary: Infinite ore generation; the single most disruptive renewable in the pack.

disable_levers.method: KubeJS recipe removal of Ore Laser Base

disable_levers.effect: weakens lens-targeting; player needs many lenses

renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Remove via KubeJS. Loses one machine; rest of IF stays useful.

user_decision.details: Removed recipes for industrialforegoing:laser_drill and industrialforegoing:ore_laser_base. Lenses left craftable (inert without base). fluid_laser_base NOT touched — separate decision.

renewable_watchlist.summary: Synthetic mob loot at 256 FE/t — trivializes any mob-drop scarcity.

disable_levers.method: Raise Loot Fab Power Cost from 256 to 5000-10000 FE/t
Set Right Click To Attune = false
disable_levers.effect: forces kill-based model training; still synthetic loot after

renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Bump Loot Fab Power Cost ~20x to 5000 FE/t. Keeps the mod alive but non-trivializing.

user_decision.details: User chose 100x rather than the 20x recommendation — clearer 'endgame convenience' signal. Sim Chamber cost left default; Right Click To Attune left true.

renewable_watchlist.summary: Silk-touched vanilla spawners + GUI mob/condition swap = infinite mob spawning from one dungeon find.

disable_levers.method: Set Spawner Silk Level = -1 in apothic_spawners.cfg
disable_levers.effect: disables silk-touch capture; players use modded spawner alternatives instead
removes the secondary spawn-egg capture path

renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Set Spawner Silk Level = -1. Pushes players toward EnderIO Powered Spawner / IF Mob Duplicator (which have their own costs and proximity caps).

user_decision.details: Silk capture disabled. In-place modifier UI on naturally-placed spawners still works. Capturing Drop Chance (0.005) left default — separate, less-direct path; revisit if it becomes a problem.

renewable_watchlist.summary: Mob Duplicator + Mob Crusher closed essence loop. Renewable but requires an initial mob capture.
renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Leave default. The pack's energy curve already governs throughput. Reconsider only if it shows up as a problem in playthrough.

renewable_watchlist.summary: Soul Vial + Powered Spawner. Renewable but proximity-throttled by config defaults.

disable_levers.method: Tighten maxSpawners from 10 to 1 in enderio/machines-common.toml

renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Leave default. The maxSpawners=10 + maxEntities=2 caps already prevent megafarms.

renewable_watchlist.summary: Gateway Pylons spawn loot waves; reactivatable indefinitely with summoning materials.

disable_levers.method: Adjust per-pylon recipe costs in datapack/KubeJS

renewable_watchlist.recommendation: Leave default. Acts more like a boss arena than a passive farm.

multipliers.notes: Recipe-verified 2026-05-07: data/mekanism/recipe/processing/iron/dust/from_ore.json → 1 ore → 2 dust. Same for raw_ore.
Recipe-verified: clump/from_ore = 3, clump/from_raw_ore = 2. Raw-drop path drops one tier of multiplier vs. ore-block path. Needs Oxygen feed.
Recipe-verified: shard/from_ore = 4, shard/from_raw_ore = 8 per 3 raw. Needs Hydrogen Chloride feed.

Headline 5x figure requires silk-touched ore blocks fed to Dissolution Chamber. Raw-ore drops do not flow through the slurry path; full 5x requires the player to silk-touch ore. Needs Sulfuric Acid feed.
Standard Create ore-doubling. Crushed ore can be washed in Fan + water for nugget bonus.
Base 2x; bonus chance varies by recipe in mod data.

multipliers.machine: SAG Mill + Dark Steel grinding ball
multipliers.notes: Dark Steel is the headline grinding ball: ~150% main output multiplier + ~200% bonus chance multiplier. Other grinding balls (Energetic Alloy, Vibrant Alloy, Soularium, End Steel) have different ratios — TBD precise values.
Multi-step Oritech ore chain. Headline ~3x but precise terminal multiplier needs JEI verification when mod becomes a primary path. TBD.

automated_mining.notes: 32-block radius scan. Filter-driven. Anchor Upgrade for chunk loading. Silk Touch upgrade for 12x effective output multiplier when paired with Mekanism processing chain.
Multiblock placed on resource node. Bound to discovered nodes; finite per node.
Single-block forward auto-mine. Common pairing: cobble generator → Drill → Crushing Wheels (renewable cobble loop, but not for ores).

renewable_systems.machine: Laser Drill + Ore Laser Base + Laser Lenses
renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: 1000 FE per op, 50t cooldown × 100t base progress = ~1 ore per ~5s per drill at default. ~4 drills sustained = baseline mining replacement.
renewable_systems.notes: Multiblock: Laser Base + up to 6 surrounding Laser Drills feed it. Lens biases ore-pool weights. Biome + Y-level adjust pool. THIS IS THE TIER 0 RENEWABLE.

renewable_systems.machine: Loot Fabricator (paired with Simulation Chamber + Deep Learner)
renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: 256 FE/t → 1.3 FE per loot cycle effectively trivial. Single early generator powers it indefinitely.
renewable_systems.notes: Workflow: Deep Learner attunes blank Data Model → Simulation Chamber upgrades model with FE → Loot Fabricator synthesizes mob loot from trained model. Once trained, no mobs ever needed.

renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: Bound only by spawner spawn-rate. Stacked with EnderIO Powered Spawner / IF Mob Crusher for closed-loop.
renewable_systems.notes: The silk-capture path is the canonical decade-old modpack cheese. GUI lets you swap mob, raise spawn cap, remove conditions.

renewable_systems.machine: Mob Duplicator + Mob Crusher (closed essence loop)
renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: 5050 FE per spawn-kill cycle + 12mB essence × mob HP. Modest power demand.
renewable_systems.notes: Requires initial mob essence (Crusher fills tank). Once a mob's essence is in the system, infinite respawn loop.

renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: Energy cost scales with mob max-HP. maxEntities=2 forces consumption before next spawn. maxSpawners=10 prevents megafarm stacking.
renewable_systems.notes: Requires Soul Vial captured from a mob via Soul Binder workflow. Built-in proximity caps already throttle this — leaving default is reasonable.

renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: Per-activation summoning material cost (opal/key/etc.). Scales with player time, not AFK.
renewable_systems.notes: Reactivatable indefinitely; loot pool tied to pylon tier. More boss-arena than passive farm.

renewable_systems.machine: Budding Certus Quartz block + Growth Accelerator
renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: Hours per cluster at default; minutes with Growth Accelerator stacks.
renewable_systems.notes: Quietly renewable certus quartz. Pack-typical for AE2. Flawless tier behavior in 1.21 needs verification — newer AE2 versions have changed degradation rules.

renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: One mob per Jar; slow drop rate (~30s+ per drop batch). Single stream per setup.
renewable_systems.notes: Non-violent mob loot. Mana cost. Low-throughput; not a primary farming concern but is an alternative mob-loot path that bypasses combat.

renewable_systems.throughput_estimate: Up to 64 mB/t. Gated by upstream Polonium supply (Fission reactor waste).
renewable_systems.notes: Transmutes Polonium → Plutonium etc. via sunlight. Bounded by upstream reactor loop.

world_gen_ores.notes: Chaos Crystals require defeating Chaos Guardian per island.
Corundum is growable. Biotite renews on dragon respawn.
Charged Certus is rare; budding-block growth is the late-game source.
Biome/terrain mods only — no new ores. Can shift vanilla ore distribution by biome shape.

structure_loot_mods.notes: Better Dungeons / Desert Temples / Jungle Temples / Strongholds / Mineshafts / Nether Fortresses / Ocean Monuments / Witch Huts / End Island. One-time loot per structure.
Modifies all of the above + vanilla loot tables. Modded items get 3x weight bias. Disabling either breaks the modded loot path through structures.

mining_qol.effect: Vein-mine up to 64 blocks per swing (Shift+hotkey). 0 cooldown, 20 hunger/block, no XP cost. Configured in config/ftbultimine-server.snbt.
AOE laser pickaxe; Fortune/Silk/Magnet/Void/Light upgrades. config/mininggadgets-common.toml.
Atomic Disassembler / Meka-Tool: multi-mode tool with vein/3x3 modes.

item_collection_qol.effect: Stationary 5-7 block vacuum into adjacent inventory. Unattended.
Pickup + Magnet + Void + Auto-Smelt upgrades. Works on Create contraptions (mid-flight ore collection).

tbd_verifications.what: Precise terminal multiplier through Fragment Forge → Centrifuge → Atomic Forge
tbd_verifications.method: JEI lookup in-game when Oritech becomes a primary path

tbd_verifications.what: Per-ball multipliers (Energetic Alloy, Vibrant Alloy, Soularium, End Steel) — only Dark Steel is documented headline
tbd_verifications.method: JEI grinding ball tooltip + recipe inspection

tbd_verifications.what: Whether Flawless tier still never degrades in AE2 1.21.x
tbd_verifications.method: in-game test or AE2 docs check

tbd_verifications.what: Whether DE's dragonEggSpawnOverride interacts with Quark Ender Biotite renewability
tbd_verifications.method: test by killing dragon, checking biotite respawn
